stories.title: Project folder structure and docker-compose base setup
stories.description: Create the project directory structure with all service folders, AGENTS.md files, and a base docker-compose.yml defining all 6 containers with networking.
stories.acceptance: All service directories exist. docker-compose.yml defines hw-gateway, cctv-adapter, streaming, notifier, web-backend, web-frontend containers on a shared network.

stories.title: REST API spec document (web-backend)
stories.description: Create a complete REST API specification for web-backend covering all endpoints: auth, contacts, sites, cameras, incidents, links, equipment, alarms.
stories.acceptance: API spec document exists with all endpoints, request/response schemas, and status codes defined.

stories.title: WebSocket event spec document
stories.description: Define WebSocket event types, payload schemas, and connection lifecycle for real-time client communication.
stories.acceptance: WebSocket spec document exists with event types (crisis alert, equipment status change, system alarm) and payload schemas.

stories.title: MQTT topic spec document (hw-gateway)
stories.description: Define MQTT topic structure, message payloads, and QoS levels for H/W communication.
stories.acceptance: MQTT spec document exists covering safety/{siteId}/alert, heartbeat, cmd/restart topics with payload schemas.

stories.title: Inter-service HTTP API spec document
stories.description: Define internal HTTP APIs between S/W services: hw-gateway<->notifier, hw-gateway<->web-backend, notifier<->web-backend, streaming<->web-backend.
stories.acceptance: Internal API spec document exists with all service-to-service endpoints, payloads, and error responses.

stories.title: MQTT client: crisis signal and heartbeat subscription
stories.description: Implement MQTT client that subscribes to alert and heartbeat topics, parses messages, and forwards crisis events to notifier and web-backend via HTTP.
stories.acceptance: hw-gateway connects to MQTT broker, receives alert messages, and successfully forwards to notifier and web-backend.

stories.title: Restart command MQTT publish
stories.description: Implement HTTP endpoint that receives restart commands from web-backend and publishes them to MQTT.
stories.acceptance: POST /api/restart receives command and publishes to safety/{siteId}/cmd/restart topic.

stories.title: Heartbeat equipment status in-memory management
stories.description: Track equipment alive/dead status based on heartbeat messages. Expose status via HTTP GET endpoint.
stories.acceptance: Equipment status reflects last heartbeat. Devices marked dead after configurable timeout. GET /api/equipment/status returns current state.

stories.title: CCTV adapter single camera connection
stories.description: Connect to a single CCTV camera via RTSP and forward the raw H.264 stream to the streaming server without transcoding.
stories.acceptance: cctv-adapter connects to one camera via RTSP and streams to streaming server. No transcoding occurs.

stories.title: Multi-camera stream management
stories.description: Manage multiple simultaneous camera connections with health monitoring and disconnect/reconnect handling.
stories.acceptance: Multiple cameras stream simultaneously. Disconnected cameras show status. Reconnection is automatic.

stories.title: Streaming server HLS serving
stories.description: Receive H.264 streams and serve as HLS (remux only). Provide stream URL list API.
stories.acceptance: HLS streams available at /live/{cameraId}/index.m3u8. GET /api/streams returns URL list. No transcoding.

stories.title: KakaoTalk API integration
stories.description: Integrate with KakaoTalk API to send crisis notification messages including site info and temporary CCTV link.
stories.acceptance: Crisis event triggers KakaoTalk message to all contacts with correct content.

stories.title: SMS fallback logic
stories.description: When KakaoTalk fails, retry via SMS. When both fail, send system alarm to web-backend.
stories.acceptance: KakaoTalk failure triggers SMS. SMS failure triggers web alarm. All attempts logged.

stories.title: Temporary link request and message inclusion
stories.description: Request temporary CCTV link from web-backend and include it in notification messages.
stories.acceptance: Notification messages contain a valid temporary link. Link works for 24h CCTV access.

stories.title: SQLite schema initialization and migration
stories.description: Initialize SQLite database with contacts, cameras, sites, incidents tables. Support schema migration.
stories.acceptance: Database created on first run with correct schema. Migration mechanism in place.

stories.title: Authentication: login, sign-up, admin approval
stories.description: Implement JWT-based auth with login, registration (pending approval), and admin approval endpoints.
stories.acceptance: Users can register, admin can approve. Login returns JWT. Unapproved users cannot access protected endpoints.

stories.title: Contacts CRUD API
stories.description: Full CRUD for notification target contacts (name, phone).
stories.acceptance: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/contacts work correctly with validation.

stories.title: Site info management API
stories.description: API for managing site information (address, manager name, manager phone).
stories.acceptance: GET/PUT /api/sites work correctly.

stories.title: Temporary link create/verify/revoke
stories.description: Generate JWT-based temporary CCTV links (24h), verify tokens, and support forced revocation via in-memory blacklist.
stories.acceptance: POST creates link. GET verifies. DELETE revokes. Expired/revoked links rejected.

stories.title: Crisis WebSocket push
stories.description: On crisis event from hw-gateway, broadcast alert to all connected WebSocket clients.
stories.acceptance: Crisis event triggers real-time push to all connected clients.

stories.title: Restart command API (forward to hw-gateway)
stories.description: REST endpoint that receives restart command and forwards to hw-gateway via HTTP.
stories.acceptance: POST /api/equipment/restart forwards to hw-gateway and returns result.

stories.title: Camera list and HLS URL API
stories.description: Provide camera list from DB and fetch HLS URLs from streaming service.
stories.acceptance: GET /api/cameras returns camera info with HLS stream URLs.

stories.title: Incident history API
stories.description: Query incident history with pagination.
stories.acceptance: GET /api/incidents returns paginated incident list with filters.

stories.title: Bottom tab bar layout (mobile)
stories.description: Mobile-first bottom tab navigation with CCTV, Incidents, Management, Settings tabs.
stories.acceptance: Tab bar renders on mobile. Tabs switch content. Active tab highlighted.

stories.title: CCTV multi-view + camera switching
stories.description: Grid view of multiple camera HLS streams. Tap to enlarge. Camera switching.
stories.acceptance: Multiple cameras display in grid. Tap enlarges to full. HLS playback works.

stories.title: Crisis alert banner (WebSocket)
stories.description: Real-time crisis alert banner via WebSocket connection to web-backend.
stories.acceptance: Crisis event shows persistent banner with details. Dismissible.

stories.title: Contact management UI
stories.description: CRUD interface for notification target contacts.
stories.acceptance: List, add, edit, delete contacts. Phone number validation.

stories.title: Site info management UI
stories.description: View and edit site information (address, manager).
stories.acceptance: Display and edit site info. Save persists to backend.

stories.title: Temporary link create/manage UI
stories.description: Create temporary CCTV links and manage (view, revoke) existing ones.
stories.acceptance: Create link shows copyable URL. List shows active links. Revoke works.

stories.title: Account management UI (admin only)
stories.description: Admin interface to view pending registrations and approve/reject users.
stories.acceptance: Admin sees pending users. Approve/reject buttons work. Non-admins cannot access.

stories.title: Equipment restart button (2-step confirmation)
stories.description: Restart button with 2-step confirmation dialog to prevent accidental restarts.
stories.acceptance: First click shows confirmation. Second click sends restart. Cancel aborts.

stories.title: 119 emergency call button with location
stories.description: Emergency call button that uses browser Geolocation API and initiates 119 call.
stories.acceptance: Button requests location permission. Shows confirmation with address. Initiates tel:119 call.

stories.title: Viewer-only page /view/{token}
stories.description: Minimal CCTV viewer page accessible via temporary JWT link. No login required.
stories.acceptance: Valid token shows CCTV player. Expired/invalid token shows error. No navigation or management UI.

stories.title: Incident history page
stories.description: List of past crisis incidents with timestamps and confirmation details.
stories.acceptance: Paginated incident list displays. Shows occurred_at, confirmed_at, confirmed_by.

stories.title: Crisis E2E: Mock H/W -> SMS receipt
stories.description: End-to-end test: mock H/W publishes MQTT alert -> hw-gateway -> notifier -> SMS delivery confirmed.
stories.acceptance: Mock MQTT message triggers full chain. SMS (or mock) received with correct content and temp link.

stories.title: Restart E2E: Web button -> MQTT -> H/W mock receipt
stories.description: End-to-end test: web restart button -> web-backend -> hw-gateway -> MQTT publish -> mock H/W receives.
stories.acceptance: Web button click triggers MQTT publish. Mock H/W subscriber receives restart command.
